description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on the default Docker image (e.g., ubuntu) and installs system packages and the BATS testing framework in a before_script. The before_script should execute: apt-get update -qq, apt-get -y install libcunit1 libcunit1-doc libcunit1-dev, apt-get -y install libcairo2-dev, git clone https://github.com/sstephenson/bats.git /tmp/bats, mkdir -p /tmp/local, bash /tmp/bats/install.sh /tmp/local, and export PATH=$PATH:/tmp/local/bin. Add a build stage with a build job that runs make. Add a test stage with a test job that runs make test.
